items.title: China AI Star Zhipu’s ‘Low Float’ Risk Persists After Share Sale
items.description: Zhipu, China’s hottest AI stock, may continue to see wild swings as the company’s $4 billion equities fundraising does little to meaningfully boost its thin pool of publicly tradable shares.

items.title: Prabowo’s Clampdown on Indonesian Tycoons Fuels Capital Flight
items.description: High-net-worth individuals say they fear the president may turn to more forceful measures to extract their money.

items.title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Mideast Tensions and Rate Outlook
items.description: Gold steadied, as investors assessed the fallout from renewed fighting in the Middle East and the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.

items.title: A Tiny Island Near Singapore Has Become Asia’s Hub for Russian Oil
items.description: At least $1.6 billion worth of Moscow’s diesel, fuel oil and other products has been funneled from Indonesia’s tiny Karimun into major markets across the region.

items.title: Asian Stocks Rise Following Chip Rally, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
items.description: Asian stocks gained as investors piled back into semiconductor stocks on renewed optimism over AI-driven demand. Oil fell.

items.title: Oil Steadies at End of Volatile Week as US and Iran Keep Talking
items.description: Oil steadied at the end of a bumpy week, as talks between the US and Iran continued despite a flare-up in fighting that drove a steep drop in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Activist Donerail Urges Beazer Homes to Engage With Suitors
items.description: Activist investor Donerail Group is urging the board of Beazer Homes USA Inc. to engage with potential buyers after rival homebuilder Dream Finders Homes Inc. boosted its takeover offer this week.
